name: Sebastian Parada
subject: lithium production on the rise in latin america
draft_body: Hi Sebastian, with SQM planning to expand lithium production by over 70%, I know scaling site safety is a massive operational focus. Mining peers like Anglo American use FlytBase for 24/7 autonomous drone monitoring to scale those inspections without putting contracted crews at risk. Worth 15 minutes to see if this fits how you currently handle site surveys?
source_signal_used: planned lithium production expansion of over 70% by Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile (SQM) alongside Codelco
